problem: What membrane material filters all contaminants from water at low energy cost?
hypothesis: What membrane material filters all contaminants from water at low energy cost? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Hydrogel. Hydrogel swelling/shrinking response directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Prototype device testing with 29 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
